meaning: n.用杯吸法者,用吸器放血者
examples: This is the point in the assessment process where the cupper makes a personal appraisal.
The metal tin electrodeposited on cupper foil was used as anode material of lithium-ion batteries.
Tenorite is an oxide of cupper which has been studied in detail on its structure, force constants and spectrum.
"It was just lovely to see it from a Ryder Cupper, and probably a future Ryder Cup captain, " said Davies.
